title: Dollar General Celebrates First Montana Store Grand Opening
text: COLUMBIA FALLS, Mont.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Dollar General marked a major milestone as it celebrated the grand opening of its first store in Montana. With the addition of the Columbia Falls store in Montana, DG now serves all 48 continental U.S. states. “Today marks an exciting milestone in our history as we extend our ability to provide customers with convenient and affordable access to household essentials throughout all 48 continental states,” said Steve Deckard, Dollar General's executiv.

title: Dollar General Corporation Scheduled to Participate in the Goldman Sachs 30th Annual Global Retailing Conference
text: GOODLETTSVILLE, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dollar General Corporation (NYSE: DG) today announced that Dollar General management plans to participate in a fireside chat at the Goldman Sachs 30th Annual Global Retailing Conference on September 13, 2023 at 12:30 p.m. ET. A live webcast will be available at https://investor.dollargeneral.com under “News & Events, Events & Presentations,” and a replay of the session will be accessible at the same location through October 13, 2023. About Dollar.

title: Dollar General Announces Ongoing Support of Jacksonville Community
text: GOODLETTSVILLE, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dollar General today announced its ongoing support for the DG family and the greater Jacksonville community following Saturday's tragedy, including initial resource commitments as well as plans to continue evaluating how it can best support employees, the victims' families and the greater Jacksonville community. In addition to the ongoing counseling resources and the financial support provided and available directly to the victims' families, Dollar Genera.
